architecture_notes: Keep FileOutcomes as a facade over pure peer classification and pure group outcome selection.
Neither child touches transports, snapshots, paths, metadata writes, or peer files.

children.name: PeerFileClassification
children.responsibility: Classify one peer's supplied live, absent, snapshot, and last-seen facts for one file path.

children.name: GroupFileDecision
children.responsibility: Select the group file outcome, source facts, copy intents, displacement intents, and per-peer decision facts from classified peer states.
